title: Class of 2021 Go Local Master’s Convocation
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Class of 2021 Go Local Master’s Convocation
NYU Shanghai held a Go Local Master’s Convocation on Friday May 21, 2021 for 88 Go Local graduates from NYU Center for Data Science, Silver School of Social Work, School of Professional Studies, Steinhardt School of Culture, Education, and Human Development, Tandon School of Engineering, Tisch School of the Arts, and Wagner Graduate School of Public Service.
Watch the 2021 Go Local Master's Convocation highlight video:
Watch the entire ceremony here.
Welcome Messages from NYU New York Deans and Directors
Arthur Spirling, Center for Data Science
Susan Greenbaum, School of Professional Studies
Martin Ihrig, School of Professional Studies
Qingwen Xu, Silver School of Social Work
Lisa Sasson, Steinhardt School of Culture, Education, and Human Development
Jelena Kovacevic, Tandon School of Engineering
Dan O’Sullivan, Tisch School of the Arts
Sherry Glied, Wagner Graduate School of Public Service
Tribute Video and More
Tribute Video

text_blocks.text: Class of 2021 Go Local Master’s Convocation

NYU Shanghai held a Go Local Master’s Convocation on Friday May 21, 2021 for 88 Go Local graduates from NYU Center for Data Science, Silver School of Social Work, School of Professional Studies, Steinhardt School of Culture, Education, and Human Development, Tandon School of Engineering, Tisch School of the Arts, and Wagner Graduate School of Public Service.
